title: 10 best herbal tinctures for earache
description: English lavender tinctures helps with earache because of its natural anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The herb's active compounds, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, have been shown to reduce swelling and ease pain in the ear canal. Additionally, English lavender has a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help to relax the muscles surrounding the ear and promote relief from discomfort and tension.
